text.title: pnpm Workspace Commands and Monorepo Patterns
text.summary: Monorepo workspace declaration, filter commands, workspace protocol, dep management, and publishing workflow.

section.title: Workspace Setup
section.p: Root package.json: private: true, scripts running pnpm -r build / test / lint across all packages.

rule.statement: Use workspace:* for all internal dependency references. pnpm publish rewrites workspace:* to actual resolved versions at publish time — no manual conversion needed.
rule.rationale: workspace:* ensures internal packages always use the local version during development and get correct semver ranges in the published artifact.

section.title: Filter Commands
section.p: pnpm --filter web build — run in specific package by name.
pnpm --filter "@mycompany/*" build — run in all packages matching scope.
pnpm --filter web... build — run in package and all its dependencies.
pnpm --filter "...[origin/main]" build — build only packages changed since origin/main. Major CI win for monorepos.
pnpm -r build — run in all packages in topological order (respects dep graph).
pnpm -r --parallel build — run in all packages in parallel (ignore dep order).

section.title: Dependency Management
section.p: Add: pnpm add express zod / pnpm add -D typescript @types/node / pnpm add --save-peer react
Add workspace dep: pnpm --filter web add @mycompany/ui --workspace
Update: pnpm update --latest (ignore semver) / pnpm update -i (interactive)
Show outdated: pnpm outdated / pnpm outdated -r --format json (for agent consumption)

rule.statement: Run pnpm dedupe after major upgrades. Without it, the lockfile accumulates duplicate package versions that slow installs and increase bundle size.
rule.rationale: Agents forget dedupe. Over time, the lockfile bloats with multiple versions of the same package at slightly different patch versions.

section.title: Store Management
section.p: pnpm store prune — remove unreferenced packages. pnpm store status — verify integrity. pnpm fetch — populate store without install (Docker layer pre-warming).
Cache store separately in CI: ~/.local/share/pnpm/store/v3 (not node_modules).
section.reference: Multi-stage Dockerfile using pnpm fetch for layer caching
GitHub Actions workflow with pnpm store cache

section.title: Publishing
section.p: pnpm publish / pnpm -r publish for workspace. Use Changesets for version management: pnpm add -Dw @changesets/cli, pnpm changeset (create), pnpm changeset version (update), pnpm -r publish.

rule.statement: After pnpm patch, commit both the patch file and the pnpm.patchedDependencies field in package.json in the same commit.
rule.rationale: The patch file alone without package.json registration is ignored; the package.json update alone without the patch file fails install. Both are required atomically.
